decisions.rationale: IR re-read confirms bTJCv (Continue Path, style_ref:bTJCv) lives in path-detail-popup footer under ai_RNbBHYJu alongside enroll/unenroll/upgrade, but PATHS-03 decompose scope and AC-1..AC-3 only obligate ai_RNbBHYJw/Jv and bTJHa — bTJCv was never added to formal ui_refs[] or acceptance criteria despite decompose-review C-3 flag. Implement satisfies all scoped ACs at 100%; review ok=true. bTJHg/bTJHi ButtonClicked workflow is ChangePage/session-navigation parity owned by PATHS-07-session-completion-route-integration (URL ?session= param, current_session on bTItY list). Defer bTJCv CTA + navigation stub to PATHS-07 or a paths footer polish pass.

IR intermediate wrapper groups ai_RNbBHYJR (path-detail-header-text), ai_RNbBHYJg (path-detail-steps-group), and ai_RNbBHYJp (progress-bar-wrap) are flattened while named child markers (ai_RNbBHYJS/JZ, ai_RNbBHYJh/Ji, bTItq/bTIuq) remain and review ui_evidence passes those selectors. PATHS-03 ACs name header ai_RNbBHYJQ, body ai_RNbBHYJc, and progress group ai_RNbBHYJn — not the omitted wrapper ids. Layout and copy parity are preserved; missing wrappers affect parity-tooling parent_element_id chains only. Defer optional data-bubble-id wrapper inserts as marker polish (same pattern as PATHS-02 triage C-2/C-3).

Confirmed in Paths.tsx: viewingEnrollment snapshot is set on open and passed to PathDetailPopup; handleEnroll calls refresh() on pathsEnrollmentStore but does not re-sync the popup prop, so footer CTA visibility (showEnroll/showUnenroll) stays stale until close/reopen. enrollInPath/unenrollFromPath persist correctly (FV-2/FV-3 pass; AC-3 satisfied for API wiring). Store and grid consumers see refreshed enrollments; PATHS-06 and PATHS-07 depends_on gates do not require live popup CTA flip. Defer derive enrollment from store by enrollmentId or post-refresh viewingEnrollment sync as PATHS-03 UX polish.

Brownfield mapping critique is already resolved in coverage preflight: mapped_target_files documents PathDetailPopup.tsx as the popup implementation and pathsEnrollmentApi.ts path; reuse_decision gap-fill is appropriate. Legacy frontend/src/pages/PathDetail.tsx remains a separate /paths/:slug route prototype and is outside PATHS-03 popup-from-grid AC-1 scope. No rewrite or coverage gap — documentation artifact only.

DialogOverlay carries ai_RNbBHYMU data-bubble-id and shadcn overlay styling; Group_overlay_ is listed in decompose ui_refs and layout_notes but ACs do not require data-style-ref on the overlay node. ui_evidence partial on style_ref only; visible modal overlay behavior passes. Defer bubbleStyle('Group_overlay_') or data-style-ref on DialogOverlay as style-catalog parity polish.

summary: 0 fix_now, 4 defer, 1 accept. Advance OK — review ok=true, coverage 100%, functional_ok=true, no blockers, all ACs pass. Deferred: C-1 bTJCv Continue Path footer CTA to PATHS-07 session-navigation; C-2 intermediate wrapper bubble-id markers (parity tooling); C-3 post-enroll popup CTA sync polish; C-5 Group_overlay_ style_ref on overlay. Accepted: C-4 brownfield target_files mapping already documented in coverage preflight.
